subcodes.first_line: O Dove! Hearken unto the Voice raised from the Dayspring of Grandeur in the Prison of 'Akká: Verily, there is none other God but Me [3.5s]... ...Abandon that which ye possess, and seize that which God, Who layeth low the necks of men, hath brought
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقاء ان استمع الندآء من مطلع الکبریاء المرتفع فی سجن عکا انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
